title: How do I book a ticket on Axplore?
description: Search your destination, choose an option, enter passenger details, and complete payment to confirm booking.

title: Can I book tickets for someone else?
description: Yes, you can enter passenger details for anyone while booking.

title: Where can I check my booking status?
description: Go to 'My Bookings' section in the app to track your bookings.

title: Can I modify passenger details after booking?
description: This depends on the service provider. Please check booking details or contact support.

title: What payment methods are supported?
description: We support UPI, debit/credit cards, net banking, and wallets.

title: Is my payment secure?
description: Yes, all payments are processed via secure encrypted payment gateways.

title: What should I do if payment fails?
description: Retry with another method. If money is deducted, it will be refunded within 5–7 business days.

title: What is the refund policy?
description: Refunds depend on provider cancellation policies shown during booking.

title: How long does refund take?
description: Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days.

title: Can I cancel my booking?
description: Yes, from 'My Bookings'. Charges may apply.

title: Can I reschedule my booking?
description: Depends on provider policy. Contact support if needed.

title: How will I receive my ticket?
description: Ticket is available in app and sent via email/SMS.

title: Do I need printed ticket?
description: Usually digital ticket is enough unless specified.

title: How can I contact support?
description: Use help section in app or contact via email/phone.

title: How do I update my profile?
description: Go to profile section and edit your details.

title: How is my data protected?
description: We follow strict security and encryption standards.

title: Are there hidden charges?
description: No, all charges are shown before payment.

title: What if my trip is cancelled?
description: You will get refund or alternative options.
